questions.text: What was one of the first big challenges or disappointments you remember facing as a child or teenager?
Was there a time in your younger years when something felt unfair or out of your control?
What was a difficult situation at home, school or with friends that you had to navigate alone or with little support?
Did you ever fail at something important early on — how did you handle that feeling?
What was one loss (person, pet, place, dream) that hit you hard when you were younger?
Looking back, what small hardship taught you an early lesson about resilience?
What was a major challenge in your 20s or 30s (career, relationship, health, finances…)?
Was there a time you felt completely overwhelmed or like you were at your lowest point?
Did you ever face a betrayal, rejection or deep disappointment that changed how you trusted people?
What was a period of prolonged struggle (illness, grief, financial stress, addiction…) that tested you the most?
Looking back, which hard time do you now realise quietly built your strength or character?
Was there a challenge you overcame that you're most proud of — even if no one else saw how hard it was?
Did any difficult experience ever lead to a positive change or new direction in your life?
What is one thing you wish you had known or had during your darkest moments?
Is there a hardship you still carry some anger, sadness or unresolved feeling about?
What forgiveness (to yourself or someone else) have you had to work toward after a hard time?
Looking back, what one challenge do you now see as a defining part of your story?
What do you hope your children or loved ones learn from the hard times you've been through?
If you could speak directly to yourself during your most painful moment, what would you say?
What do you want future generations to know about how you survived or grew through difficulty?
Is there a loss or challenge you still grieve in some way — and how do you carry it now?
Looking at your entire life, what one hard experience would you say shaped your deepest values?
